description: Fixture eval suite for the release-note-writer skill. Used only as staged test material for skill-eval-runner evals — three evals so the runner has concrete ids, names, and one eval that declares a files input.

evals.name: single-feature-release
evals.prompt: Write the release notes for v1.4.0. The only merged PR is #812 'Add dark-mode toggle to settings' (labeled feature).
evals.expected_output: A ## v1.4.0 section with a single ### Features bullet referencing PR #812, and no empty groups.
expectations: Response groups PR #812 under a Features heading.
Response omits empty groups (no empty Fixes/Docs/Internal sections).

evals.name: group-by-change-type
evals.prompt: Write the release notes for v2.0.0 from the merged PRs in the attached file.
evals.expected_output: A ## v2.0.0 section that groups each PR under the correct change-type heading, newest first, one bullet per PR.
expectations: Response places each PR under the correct group (Features/Fixes/Docs/Internal).
Response includes one bullet per merged PR in the file.
Response lists PRs newest-first within each group.

evals.name: decline-when-no-merges
evals.prompt: Write the release notes for v2.0.1. Nothing has been merged since v2.0.0.
evals.expected_output: The skill should report that there are no merged changes to release rather than inventing bullets.
expectations: Response states there is nothing to release / no merged changes.
Response does NOT fabricate feature or fix bullets.
